prompt: Create a cinematic travel poster-style photograph of a narrow old European street in Lisbon, viewed from slightly above and looking downhill between tall historic apartment buildings. A classic yellow tram is centered on the tracks, facing the viewer, with cobblestone pavement, overhead tram wires, aged cream and yellow facades, stone window frames, balconies, street lamps, and graffiti-covered walls on both sides. Warm golden-hour sunlight should create long soft shadows and a nostalgic urban atmosphere, with a glimpse of water or distant horizon at the end of the street. Add bold centered typography over the tram: the main headline reads LISBON in large distressed white uppercase block letters with wide spacing. Beneath it, add a smaller handwritten cursive subtitle reading Lost in the right direction. Add thin horizontal divider lines extending left and right under the subtitle, with a small white diamond/star ornament centered between the lines. Use realistic photography, high detail, warm color grading, strong depth, no people, no vehicles other than the single tram, and no extra text or watermark.
